summary: Classified the 10 live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical was selected because this shard is not a dedupe cluster. No security-sensitive refs were detected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise actions are planned because the job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths; ready or review-blocked PRs are routed only to targeted maintainer attention.
